nodes.name: HTTP - Gọi AWS Bedrock
nodes.notes:
Credential type: AWS
Region: us-east-1 (change if needed)
Make sure Amazon Nova Lite is enabled in Bedrock Model Access

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: { session_id: $json["session_id"], reply: $json["reply"], recommendations: $json["recommendations"], intent: $json["intent"] } }) }}
